stem: What are the two basic principles a representative should be aware of before making any product recommendation?

options.A: Recommend the highest-commission product, and recommend it to every client
options.B: Recommend products only if the client needs them, and only those most suitable for his circumstances
options.C: Recommend the cheapest product, and review it every year
options.D: Recommend whatever the client asks for, regardless of suitability

explanation: 教材 2.1 列出两条基本原则:(a)只在客户确有需要时推荐产品;(b)只推荐在其处境下最合适的产品。其余选项均与原则相悖。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.1

stem: Before a client begins sourcing for other investment tools, how much should a client with regular income aim to set aside as emergency savings?

options.A: At least 1 to 2 months' worth of expenses
options.B: At least 12 months' worth of expenses
options.C: At least 3 to 6 months' worth of expenses

explanation: 教材 2.6 指出,有固定收入的客户应至少备足 3 至 6 个月的开支作为应急储蓄,可使用高流动性低风险工具(如国库券、SSB)或储蓄账户。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.6

stem: According to MAS' Basic Financial Planning Guide, what level of coverage is recommended for death and total permanent disability?
explanation: 教材 2.8 指出,MAS《基本财务规划指南》建议身故及完全永久伤残取 9 倍年收入;4 倍年收入是针对标准危疾的建议,故 A 错。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.8

stem: Why are insurance products considered the most suitable type of products to meet a client's protection needs?

options.A: Because their cash value always exceeds the premiums paid
options.B: Because they are guaranteed to outperform equities
options.C: Because they create an immediate estate, paying the full sum assured on the insured event even after only one premium
options.D: Because they are exempt from all charges and distribution costs

explanation: 教材 2.7 指出保险的独特功能是创造"即时资产":即使只缴过一次保费,投保事件发生时也全额支付保额。其他工具如储蓄需时间累积,较不合适。A/B/D 均无教材依据。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.7

stem: Under the Dependants' Protection Scheme (DPS), what is the maximum payout for an insured member until age 60?
explanation: 教材 2.9 指出 DPS 在身故、末期疾病或 TPD 时,60 岁前最高赔付 S$70,000;60 岁以上至 65 岁最高 S$55,000(即 A)。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.9

stem: The Dependants' Protection Scheme (DPS) is automatically extended to Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents within which age band upon their first CPF working contribution?
explanation: 教材 2.9 指出 DPS 在 21 至 65 岁的新加坡公民及永久居民首次 CPF 工作缴款时自动延展。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.9

stem: According to the quick affordability guide, what is the recommended maximum proportion of income (after deducting CPF contributions) to spend on insurance protection?
explanation: 教材 2.11 指出保险保障支出最多为收入(扣除 CPF 后)的 15%,捆绑产品因兼含投资与保障可能超过 15%;至少 10% 用于退休等目标的投资(即 A,是投资门槛而非保障上限)。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.11

stem: A client is risk-averse and has a short investment horizon, and needs to choose an Investment-Linked Plan or unit trust fund. What would be most suitable?

options.A: A fund comprising substantial equities with a very small percentage of bonds
options.B: A fund comprising a substantial amount of bonds with a small percentage of stocks
options.D: A fund invested entirely in property

explanation: 教材 2.16 指出,若客户厌恶风险且投资期限较短,应推荐含大量债券、少量股票、回报相对稳定的基金。A 适合风险偏好且期限长者;C/D 波动高,不合适。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.16

stem: Which monetisation option is available to a client aged 55 or above who wishes to unlock value from his property?
explanation: 教材 2.6(退休需求段)指出,55 岁或以上客户可探索房产变现选项,包括银发安居花红、屋契回购计划(Lease Buyback Scheme)、出租房间/组屋。A 是退休投资工具,B 是保障计划,D 是低成本保险渠道,均非房产变现方式。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.6 (Retirement)

stem: A client desires permanent coverage but cannot afford it at this time. Which solution best allows him to obtain permanent coverage later when his finances improve?

options.C: An endowment with immediate surrender value
options.D: Direct Purchase Insurance with no advice

explanation: 教材 2.20 指出,对希望永久保障但暂时负担不起的客户,可建议可转换定期(Convertible Term)保单,待财务状况改善后转为永久保单。其余选项不提供这一转换路径。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.20

stem: When prioritising a client's needs, the textbook states that where there are dependants, which need should generally be met first?
explanation: 教材 2.21 指出,排序大概没有硬性规则,但在有受养人的情况下,保障需求应优先满足。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.21

stem: Which of the following is NOT one of the estate/legacy planning areas listed in the chapter?
explanation: 教材 2.25 列出的遗产/传承规划领域为:遗嘱、CPF 提名、持久授权书(LPA)、预先护理计划(ACP)。"可撤销家族信托契据"不在所列之中,故为正确答案。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.25

stem: Regarding non-participating plans and a client's risk tolerance, which statement is correct per the chapter?

options.A: Non-participating plans are guaranteed in nature, so the client does not retain any investment risk under the policy
options.B: Non-participating plans expose the client to the full investment risk of the underlying fund
options.C: Non-participating plans are only suitable for risk seekers with long horizons
options.D: Non-participating plans always outperform participating plans

explanation: 教材 2.14 指出非分红计划本质上是保证的,因此客户在保单下不保留任何投资风险。B 与此相反;C/D 无教材依据。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — s.2.14

stem: In the product recommendation example, what should the adviser consider doing if he doubts that the client does not understand certain critical product features, especially for investment products?

options.A: Proceed with the sale but record the doubt
options.C: Refer the client to a tax specialist
options.D: Recommend a higher sum assured to compensate

explanation: 教材范例指出,解释产品至客户理解是顾问的责任;若怀疑客户不理解关键产品特征(尤其投资产品),应考虑中止销售;对未通过客户知识评估者尤其如此。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.24 — Example (Product recommendation)
